column1: # multiwarm_session_pool perf bench — single-warm vs multi-warm (task #155)
# date=2026-05-30  host=AMD Ryzen 9 7950X / NVIDIA RTX 5070 (12 GiB)  cuda=13.2
# code=zenmetrics master 734b707f (+ uncommitted default-flip; bench sets the flag explicitly so unaffected)
# harness=crates/zenmetrics-orchestrator/examples/multiwarm_bench.rs  reps=5  median wall  cold subprocess per cell
# workload=6 distinct refs x 8 distortions = 48 tasks/rep, round-robin (FIFO submit, no sort) — forces ref switches
# multiwarm cfg: budget=auto(free-floor), max_entries=8   single-warm: 1 cached ref, in-place set_reference reuse
# set_ref col: multi = actual set_reference installs; single 'win_miss' = cached-ref window misses (NOT raw installs)
# GPU was idle/uncontended for this run (0 panics). speedup = single_ms / multi_ms (>1 = multi faster)
